author: eykd
text: TRIAGE: Closing — False positive. The use case and its spec are implemented with all unit tests passing and no remaining unit-level work. Acceptance test failures are expected at this stage — they depend on downstream wiring tasks (DI, route handlers) that are separate items in the epic.

author: eykd

author: eykd
text: TRIAGE: Decomposed — Unit tests pass but acceptance tests fail — the domain/application layer is complete but HTTP route wiring (Hono handlers, DI registration, response DTO shape) is broken. Ralph's TDD loop cannot fix this because no unit test can be written to expose the gap. A focused wiring task is needed.. New sibling task created under CLAW-7ad.6

author: eykd
text: BLOCKED: RED circuit-breaker triggered in cycle 4. All unit tests pass but no failing test could be written, AND acceptance tests still fail. Feature may be partially implemented. Needs human review.

author: eykd
text: TRIAGE: Decomposed — Ralph's TDD loop cannot handle presentation/DI wiring — no unit test can be written for route registration or DI assembly. The remaining work is integration: create Hono route handlers, register them in the app router, and wire DI. Acceptance tests (not unit tests) are the verification. Decomposing into an integration-focused task that bypasses the RED step requirement.. New sibling task created under CLAW-7ad.6

author: eykd
text: BLOCKED: RED circuit-breaker triggered in cycle 1. All unit tests pass but no failing test could be written, AND acceptance tests still fail. Feature may be partially implemented. Needs human review.

author: eykd
text: TRIAGE: Deferring +1d — Ralph's TDD circuit-breaker is incompatible with this non-TDD integration task. The task explicitly requires skipping RED and verifying only via `just acceptance`, but the automation loop enforces RED-GREEN-REFACTOR and blocks when no failing unit test can be written. Needs direct human implementation: wire Hono routes (POST/GET /api/v1/inbox), connect DI in serviceFactory.ts, and verify with `just acceptance`. Partial progress exists in uncommitted changes.

author: eykd
text: Security review complete. 2 findings confirmed after verification (several others denied as false positives). Created 2 remediation tasks: CLAW-7ad.10 (global error handler, p2) and CLAW-7ad.11 (FK cascade on actor, p2).
